title: Microfluidic & Bioanalytical Systems
titleZh: 微流體與生物分析系統
tagline: From lab-on-a-chip physics to sample-to-answer platforms
taglineZh: 從實驗室晶片物理到完整的樣品分析平台
why: We turn complex biological handling into compact, programmable systems that can prepare, separate, and analyse samples with less infrastructure.
whyZh: 我們將複雜的生物樣品操作轉化為小型、可程式化系統，降低樣品前處理、分離與分析所需的基礎設施。
challenge: Reliable droplet handling, parallel operation, sample variation, and filtration fouling must be solved together before a chip becomes a usable system.
challengeZh: 液滴的穩定操作、平行化、樣品差異與過濾污染，都必須一併解決，晶片才能成為真正可用的系統。
innovation: Digital microfluidics, lab-on-a-chip design, and acoustofluidic filtration are developed as complementary tools for automated diagnostics and biological workflows.
innovationZh: 數位微流體、實驗室晶片與聲流體過濾彼此互補，共同建立自動化診斷與生物分析流程。
evidence: Programmable droplet transport, mixing, splitting, and dispensing
Parallel droplet generation and volume-control strategies
Bubble-streaming filtration removes fouling in about 0.5 s
evidenceZh: 可程式化液滴輸送、混合、分裂與分注
平行液滴生成與體積控制策略
氣泡聲流過濾約 0.5 秒移除污染層
future: Integrated sample-to-answer diagnostics, automated biology, and scalable parallel operation.
futureZh: 整合式 sample-to-answer 診斷、自動化生物分析與可擴充的平行操作。
connects: Provides the device and sample-handling foundation for wearable biosensing and AI-enabled precision health.
connectsZh: 提供穿戴式生醫感測與 AI 精準健康所需的元件與樣品處理基礎。

media.title: Digital microfluidics research
media.description: A direct look at programmable droplet manipulation and its research possibilities.
media.descriptionZh: 直接認識可程式化液滴操控與其研究可能性。

media.title: LEGO AFM: Micro- and nanotechnology education
media.titleZh: LEGO AFM：微奈米科技教育示範
media.description: A hands-on bridge from micro/nano concepts to device thinking.
media.descriptionZh: 從微奈米概念延伸到元件思維的實作示範。

title: Wearable, Flexible & Self-Powered Biosensing
titleZh: 穿戴式、柔性與自供電生醫感測
tagline: Human-centred sensing for continuous physiological insight
taglineZh: 以人為本的連續生理感測
why: Wearable devices must be comfortable, sensitive, low-cost, and dependable enough to capture meaningful signals in daily life.
whyZh: 穿戴式裝置必須兼具舒適、高靈敏、低成本與可靠性，才能在日常生活中捕捉有意義的生理訊號。
challenge: Sensitivity, range, miniaturization, repeatability, power use, and clinical relevance often pull in different directions.
challengeZh: 靈敏度、量測範圍、微型化、重複性、耗電與臨床價值常彼此拉扯。
innovation: Origami and paper architectures, nanomaterials, low-power electronics, and energy-autonomous strategies create practical multimodal sensing platforms.
innovationZh: 摺紙與紙基結構、奈米材料、低功耗電子與能源自主策略，共同形成實用的多模態感測平台。
evidence: Pulse, posture, bruxism, and trigger-finger demonstrations
evidenceZh: 脈搏、姿態、磨牙與扳機指展示
future: Multimodal e-skin, washable and self-powered integration, and deployment from wellness to clinical monitoring.
futureZh: 多模態電子皮膚、可清洗與自供電整合，以及從健康管理到臨床監測的應用。
connects: Generates continuous, real-world signals that become actionable through AI models and clinical validation.
connectsZh: 產生連續的真實世界訊號，再透過 AI 模型與臨床驗證轉化為可行動的資訊。

title: AI-Enabled Precision Health
tagline: Integrating sensing, patient context, and data-driven decisions
taglineZh: 整合感測、個人化資訊與資料驅動決策
why: Intermittent measurements cannot fully reflect treatment response or emerging risk; useful precision health needs continuous data in context.
whyZh: 間歇量測無法完整反映治療反應與即將出現的風險；有價值的精準健康需要脈絡化的連續資料。
challenge: Optical overlap, patient variation, machine artifacts, and different biomarker dynamics complicate trustworthy real-time prediction.
challengeZh: 光學訊號重疊、個體差異、設備干擾與不同生物標記動態，使可信的即時預測更具挑戰。
innovation: The hemodialysis platform combines multi-wavelength optical sensing, patient-specific variables, and machine learning—an approach extendable to multimodal biosignals.
innovationZh: 血液透析平台結合多波長光學感測、個人化變項與機器學習，並可延伸至多模態生理訊號。
evidence: Thirty sessions from nine ESRD patients
One-minute monitoring over about four hours
Prediction of six clinically relevant biomarkers
R² around 0.95 for several toxin predictions
evidenceZh: 九位 ESRD 病人、三十次療程
約四小時療程中每分鐘監測
預測六項臨床重要指標
多項尿毒素預測 R² 約達 0.95
future: Multicentre validation, intradialytic hypotension prediction, explainable AI, and integration with wearable and agricultural sensing.
futureZh: 多中心驗證、透析中低血壓預測、可解釋 AI，以及與穿戴式和農業感測系統整合。
connects: Closes the loop: it converts data from microfluidic and wearable platforms into personalised health decisions.
connectsZh: 完成閉環：將微流體與穿戴式平台的資料轉化為個人化健康決策。

media.title: Precision medicine and real-time clinical monitoring
media.titleZh: 精準醫療與即時臨床監測
media.description: Why real-time sensing and patient-specific data matter for better care.
media.descriptionZh: 說明即時感測與個人化資料如何支持更好的照護。

title: Adaptive Bioinspired & Sustainable Systems
titleZh: 適應性仿生與永續系統
tagline: Soft materials, intelligent actuation, and thermal-fluid engineering
taglineZh: 軟性材料、智慧驅動與熱流工程
why: Emerging healthcare, agricultural, and energy systems need to be safe around people and biology while using materials and energy more intelligently.
whyZh: 新一代健康、農業與能源系統必須安全地面對人與生物，同時更智慧地使用材料與能源。
challenge: Controlled soft motion, sensing integration, robust operation, and thermal reliability must be achieved without sacrificing simplicity or sustainability.
challengeZh: 可控軟性運動、感測整合、穩定操作與熱可靠度，必須在不犧牲簡潔與永續性的前提下達成。
innovation: Programmed magnetic materials enable biomimetic actuation, while thermal-fluid modelling improves the safety and efficiency of high-power systems.
innovationZh: 可程式化磁性材料實現仿生驅動；熱流模型則提升高功率系統的安全性與效率。
evidence: Four-finger robot in air and water
Peak temperature reduced from about 42.3 to 37.5 °C
evidenceZh: 四指機器人可於空氣與水中操作
20 呎 BESS 平行流冷卻研究
future: Integrated sensing, closed-loop control, assistive robots, smart agriculture, and sustainable high-power system design.
futureZh: 整合感測、閉迴路控制、輔助型機器人、智慧農業與永續高功率系統設計。
connects: Extends sensing and AI into physical action, resilient energy use, and field-ready agricultural systems.
connectsZh: 將感測與 AI 延伸至實體行動、韌性能耗管理與可落地的農業系統。

media.title: Soft robotic manipulation and the microhand
media.titleZh: 軟性機器人操控與微型仿生手
media.description: A micro-scale example of safe, biomimetic manipulation.
media.descriptionZh: 展現安全、仿生的微尺度操控。

title: Acoustofluidic Filtration
tagline: Bubble streaming for rapid separation and fouling control
taglineZh: 以氣泡聲流實現快速分離與抗污染
why: Microscale filtration is powerful but can quickly foul. Our bubble-based acoustofluidic platform restores flow while separating cells and particles.
whyZh: 微尺度過濾雖具高選擇性，卻容易因顆粒堆積而阻塞；本團隊利用氣泡聲流恢復流動並完成細胞與顆粒分離。
challenge: Maintain throughput, recovery, and sample integrity in complex mixtures.
challengeZh: 在複雜樣品中同時維持通量、回收率與樣品完整性。
innovation: Cross-flow filtration and oscillating bubbles create local streaming that clears the filter surface.
innovationZh: 錯流過濾結合振盪氣泡，形成局部聲流以清除濾膜表面。
evidenceZh: 後續 STR 分析成功
future: Stable bubbles, higher throughput, and integrated molecular analysis.
futureZh: 提升氣泡穩定性、通量並整合分子分析。
connects: Adds robust sample preparation to microfluidic and diagnostic systems.
connectsZh: 為微流體與診斷系統補上可靠的樣品前處理能力。

title: Thermal Management & Energy Systems
tagline: Thermal-fluid intelligence for batteries and high-power devices
taglineZh: 面向電池與高功率裝置的智慧熱流工程
why: Batteries and high-power electronics are limited by hot spots and uneven airflow. Better thermal design improves safety, lifetime, and energy efficiency.
whyZh: 電池與高功率電子系統受限於熱點與氣流不均；更好的熱設計能提升安全、壽命與能源效率。
challenge: Large BESS containers have complex flow paths, anisotropic cells, and layout-dependent cooling.
challengeZh: 大型 BESS 具有複雜流道、異向性電芯與高度依賴配置的冷卻效能。
innovation: CFD and parallel-flow cooling guide system-level design before expensive prototypes are built.
innovationZh: 結合 CFD 與平行流冷卻，在投入高成本原型前先優化系統設計。
future: Hybrid cooling, AI thermal control, and experimental validation.
futureZh: 混合冷卻、AI 熱管理與實驗驗證。
connects: Extends intelligent-microsystem thinking to reliable and sustainable energy infrastructure.
connectsZh: 將智慧微系統思維延伸至可靠且永續的能源基礎設施。
